paragraphs.text: 今天放学后，我和小明一起去图书馆。图书馆里很安静，大家都在认真看书。
paragraphs.translation: After school today, Xiaoming and I went to the library together. The library was very quiet, everyone was reading seriously.

paragraphs.text: 我借了一本关于恐龙的书，小明借了一本关于宇宙的书。图书馆的阿姨说下周要还回来。
paragraphs.translation: I borrowed a book about dinosaurs, Xiaoming borrowed a book about the universe. The librarian said to return them next week.

paragraphs.text: 回到家我就迫不及待地翻开书看了起来。书里的知识真有趣！
paragraphs.translation: When I got home I couldn't wait to open the book and start reading. The knowledge in the book was so interesting!
